days.text: Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. Occasional showers. A few thunderstorms. Force 2 to 4 south to southeasterly winds with gusts.

Very hot. Cloudy apart from sunny periods. One or two showers. Force 2 to 4 southeasterly winds.
Very hot. Cloudy apart from sunny periods. Force 2 to 4 east to southeasterly winds.
